sections.paragraph:
Original: נשׁך

Transliteration: nâshak

Phonetic: naw-shak'

BDB Definition:

  1. to bite
    1. (Qal) to bite
    2. (Piel) to bite
  2. to pay, give interest, lend for interest or usury
    1. (Qal) to give interest
    2. (Hiphil) to make to give interest

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1430,1430b

Part(s) of speech: Verb
